description_long: This is a large, freestanding event canopy banner with a peaked roof, supported by four slender metal poles at each corner. The canopy fabric is predominantly red and black, featuring bold branding for 'Red Samurai Brewing' and 'Red Ale' with a prominent samurai helmet graphic, laurel wreath, and Japanese architectural motifs such as a pagoda and torii gate. The branding text is repeated along the valance, and the roof is decorated with a large circular emblem and additional graphics. The structure is open on all sides, providing shelter or shade beneath the canopy. The floor beneath the canopy is depicted as a wooden surface, suggesting placement in a public or event space. The overall appearance is professional and visually striking, designed to attract attention in busy urban or festival environments.
description: A large, peaked event canopy banner for 'Red Samurai Brewing' with bold graphics, supported by a metal frame and open on all sides. The design features a samurai helmet, Japanese motifs, and prominent branding text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main branding, samurai helmet graphic, and both the pagoda and torii gate motifs clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with similar features as the front, but the right side of the canopy is more visible.
description_view_2: Opposite view of the front, showing the same branding and graphics, with the left side of the canopy more visible.
description_view_3: View from the back, mirroring the front with the same graphics and text, but the left side is now more prominent.
attribute_banner_content: company logo, product name, advertisement text, Japanese motifs
